executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned gates are all independently verified green (qualified_pass). External blockers: marketing independent verification stale/fail (2026-05-28), primary repo (Codeberg) adoption flat at 12 stars. 2 jobs show last_error: reddit-monitor (interrupted by gateway restart), blocked-channel-recovery (timeout, 550 repeats — unblocker-domain escalation). 6 jobs running concurrently at sample time.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh independent verification backed by measurable primary-repo adoption movement.
